channel.title: Family News Briefing
channel.description: Daily five-minute news briefing for the family. International news, markets, tech, and gaming.
channel.itunes:author: Andres
channel.itunes:summary: Daily five-minute news briefing for the family. International news, markets, tech, and gaming.

item.title: Family News — Friday, April 10, 2026
item.description: High-stakes diplomacy begins tomorrow in Islamabad. The US delegation, led by Vice President JD Vance along with special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, is heading to Pakistan for talks aime...

item.title: Family News — Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: The fragile two-week ceasefire between the United States, Israel, and Iran is already under severe strain. While the deal brokered through Pakistani mediation paused five weeks of direct conflict, ...

item.title: Family News — Wednesday, April 8, 2026
item.description: The biggest story this morning is the ceasefire between the United States and Iran. After weeks of escalating threats, including a dramatic ultimatum on Tuesday evening, President Trump agreed to s...

item.title: Family News — Tuesday, April 7, 2026
item.description: The Middle East conflict enters its thirty-eighth day with no signs of slowing. Iran has rejected a forty-five day ceasefire proposal from the United States, and President Trump's deadline for Iran...

item.title: Easter Triduum — Easter Sunday: The Resurrection
item.description: Francisco, Sebastian — it is Sunday morning. And the story turns.

item.title: Family News — Sunday, April 5, 2026
item.description: Pope Leo the Fourteenth delivered his first Easter message this morning from Saint Peter's Square, urging those with weapons to lay them down and those with the power to start wars to choose peace....

item.title: Easter Triduum — Holy Saturday: The Silence
item.description: Francisco, Sebastian — today is Holy Saturday.

item.title: Family News — Saturday, April 4, 2026
item.description: The war with Iran is now entering its sixth week. Yesterday, two U.S. combat aircraft were lost — an F-fifteen fighter jet shot down over Iranian territory and an A-ten attack plane that crashed ne...

item.title: Easter Triduum — Good Friday: The Passion
item.description: Francisco, Sebastian — today is Good Friday. It is the most solemn day in the Christian calendar. And I want to tell you what happened, because the story itself deserves to be heard.

item.title: Family News — Friday, April 3, 2026
item.description: The Iran war is in its thirty-fifth day and there's no off-ramp in sight. Trump's primetime address on Tuesday promised the conflict would wrap up in two to three weeks, but he also vowed to hit Ir...

item.title: Family News — Thursday, April 2, 2026
item.description: President Trump addressed the nation last night in his first primetime speech on the Iran war, now in its thirty-third day. The roughly twenty-minute address was heavy on confident rhetoric but lig...

item.title: Family News — Wednesday, April 1, 2026
item.description: The war in Iran is entering its second month, and the situation is getting more complicated by the day. President Trump has signaled interest in winding down the campaign, but Iran is warning the U...

item.title: Family News — Tuesday, March 31, 2026
item.description: The Iran conflict may be approaching a turning point. The Wall Street Journal reported yesterday that President Trump has signaled willingness to end the US military campaign. Markets reacted immed...

item.title: Family News — Monday, March 30, 2026
item.description: Day thirty of the Iran conflict. President Trump said yesterday that Iran has agreed to most of the US fifteen-point plan to end the war. But Tehran is calling that characterization misleading, wit...

item.title: Family News — Sunday, March 29, 2026
item.description: The war in the Middle East enters its thirtieth day. Iran is warning against a US ground invasion as American troop deployments to the region continue to expand. On the diplomatic front, foreign mi...

item.title: Family News — Saturday, March 28, 2026
item.description: The Iran conflict hit its one-month mark yesterday. Iran struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, injuring at least ten US service members. Two had shrapnel wounds but none were killed. Separ...

item.title: Family News — Friday, March 27, 2026
item.description: The Iran conflict enters day twenty-seven with no ceasefire in sight. President Trump extended the deadline for strikes on Iran's power grid to April sixth, saying talks are ongoing. But Iran has f...

item.title: Family News — Thursday, March 26, 2026
item.description: The US-Israel military campaign against Iran is now in its fourth week, and the picture is shifting. Iran has rejected President Trump's ceasefire proposal and put forward a counterproposal demandi...

item.title: Family News — Wednesday, March 25, 2026
item.description: The biggest story remains the U.S.-Iran conflict, now entering its fourth week. Iran has received a 15-point ceasefire plan from Washington, delivered through Pakistani intermediaries. The proposal...
